title: cordia lasiocalyx
intro: Cordia lasiocalyx, also known as the wild lime tree, is a plant species belonging to the borage family (Boraginaceae) that is native to tropical Africa. The plant has been utilized in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its essential oils and compounds such as cordiachromene. The health benefits of Cordia lasiocalyx include its potential to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a natural remedy for wounds and infections. Cordia lasiocalyx can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
